---
title: "Section 1: Core Concepts and Interpretation"
id: "binomial_distribution-se01-sec01"
section_id: "binomial_distribution-se01-sec01"
session_id: "binomial_distribution-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [What is the Binomial Distribution?](BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd)

- [Worked Example in R](BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp02.qmd)

- [Practice Activity](BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp03.qmd)

- [Summary and Reflection](BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp04.qmd)


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Core Concepts and Interpretation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">What is the Binomial Distribution?</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```
